clusters.justification: This cluster represents a broad macroscopic domain mapping onto paralimbic and autonomic regulatory networks that compute generalized emotional reactivity, mood states, and interoceptive arousal.
These terms delineate goal-directed domains mapped to frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry, encompassing reward valuation, incentive salience, and cost-benefit decision-making.

This cluster captures the integration of internal representations of the self and conceptual representations of others, mapping directly onto the Default Mode Network's axis of self-projection and social inference.
